title: potentilla arenaria var. tommasiniana
intro: Potentilla arenaria var. tommasiniana, also known as coastal cinquefoil, is a low-growing, creeping shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potent medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla arenaria var. tommasiniana include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied, and it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
